name: Golden Amaranth Short Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush a 9-inch x 9-inch cake pan with oil and lightly sprinkle with flour.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the amaranth flour, whole wheat pastry flour, baking powder, honey or maple syrup, milk or water, and vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, beat tahini into the flour until crumbly.
4. Add almonds and liquids to the flour mixture and stir until moistened.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Cool completely.
8. Cut into wedges and split in half.
9. For topping, whip tofu, honey, and vanilla together, adding milk or water if needed.
10. Spoon pineapple onto cake wedges and pour tofu mixture over all.
